heroHeadline: Russia Jails Former Kursk Governor in Graft Probe Tied to Ukraine's 2024 Cross-Border Incursion
heroSubtitle: Moscow pursues rare official accountability as corruption investigation links regional procurement failures to the security gaps that enabled Ukraine's historic seizure of Russian territory
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
